info.description: Generac Holdings, Inc. engages in the business of designing and manufacturing energy technology solutions. It operates under the Domestic and International segments. The Domestic segment includes the legacy Generac business and the acquisitions that are based in the United States and Canada. The International segment focuses on Generac business' Latin American export operations. The company was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Waukesha, WI.
info.description_zh: Generac Holdings, Inc. 從事設計和製造能源技術解決方案的業務。它在國內和國際部門下運作。國內業務包括傳統的 Generac 業務以及位於美國和加拿大的收購。國際部門專注於 Generac 業務的拉丁美洲出口業務。該公司成立於 1959 年，總部位於威斯康辛州沃科夏。

info.description: Marathon Petroleum Corp. engages in the refining, marketing, and transportation of petroleum products. It operates through the Refining and Marketing, and Midstream segments. The Refining and Marketing segment includes refining crude oil and other feedstocks, purchasing ethanol, and refined products for resale and distribution of refined products. The Midstream segment refers to transportation, storing, distribution, and marketing of crude oil and refined products. The company was founded in 1887 and is headquartered in Findlay, OH.
info.industry_zh: 石油與天然氣精煉與行銷
info.description_zh: 馬拉松石油公司從事石油產品的精煉、行銷和運輸。它透過煉油和行銷以及中游部門運作。煉油和行銷部門包括煉油原油和其他原料、採購乙醇以及用於轉售和分銷煉油產品的煉油產品。中游部門是指原油和成品油的運輸、儲存、分銷和行銷。該公司成立於 1887 年，總部位於俄亥俄州芬德利。

info.description: Mondelez International, Inc. engages in the manufacture and marketing of snack food and beverage products. Its products include beverages, biscuits, chocolate, gum and candy, cheese and groceries, and meals. Its brands include 5Star, 7Days, Alpen Gold, Barni, Belvita, Bournvita, Cadbury, Cadbury Dairy Milk, Chips Ahoy! Clif, Clorets, Club Social, Cote d'Or, Daim, Enjoy Life Foods, Freia, Grenade, Halls, Honey Maid, Hu, Kinh Do, Lacta, Lu, Marabou, Maynards Bassett's, Mikado, Milka, Oreo, Perfect Snacks, Philadelphia, Prince, Ritz, Royal, Sour Patch Kids, Stride, Tang, Tate's Bake Shop, Tiger, Toblerone, Triscuit, TUC, and Wheat Thins. It operates through the following geographical segments: Latin America, Asia, Middle East, and Africa, Europe, and North America. The company was founded by James Lewis Kraft in 1903 is headquartered in Chicago, IL.
info.description_zh: Mondelez International, Inc. 從事休閒食品和飲料產品的製造和行銷。其產品包括飲料、餅乾、巧克力、口香糖和糖果、起司和雜貨以及膳食。旗下品牌包括5Star、7Days、Alpen Gold、Barni、Belvita、Bournvita、Cadbury、Cadbury Dairy Milk、Chips Ahoy! Clif、Clorets、Club Social、Cote d'Or、Daim、享受生活美食、Freia、Grenade、Halls、Honey Maid、Kin​​ain、Luarar、Mrbouah、Mbouw、Mbour、Mbour、MrAr、MrArunh、MrA、MrAunh、MrAun​​ad、Mradman、MrAun​​ad、Millar、MrAunh、MrAun​​ad、Mrad>MrA、MAAun目標、Munun討、Munr、Mun討、Mun 這是科、Mununw、Mr 這是爸爸、Mrrunr、Mr 這是r 這是針r、33D、Yunununr、Mununr、Mrunr、Mr 這是r討、Mr 這是r 這是聲讀、3333D、Mun 這是聲、3333533333533部分。 Bassett's、Mikado、Milka、Oreo、Perfect Snacks、Philadelphia、Prince、Ritz、Royal、Sour Patch Kids、Stride、Tang、Tate's Bake Shop、Tiger、Toblerone、 Triscuit、TUC 和小麥薄片。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：拉丁美洲、亞洲、中東、非洲、歐洲和北美。該公司由 James Lewis Kraft 於 1903 年創立，總部位於伊利諾州芝加哥。

info.description: Incyte Corp. is a biopharmaceutical company, which engages in the discovery, development, and commercialization of proprietary therapeutics. It focuses on hematology and oncology, and inflammation and autoimmunity therapeutic areas. The company was founded on April 8, 1991 and is headquartered in Wilmington, DE.
info.description_zh: Incyte Corp.是一家生物製藥公司，致力於專有療法的發現、開發和商業化。它專注於血液學和腫瘤學以及發炎和自體免疫治療領域。該公司成立於1991年4月8日，總部位於德拉瓦州威爾明頓。

info.description: IQVIA Holdings, Inc. engages in the provision of analytics, technology solutions, and clinical research services to the life sciences industry. It operates through the following segments: Technology and Analytics Solutions, Research and Development Solutions, and Contract Sales and Medical Solutions. The Technology and Analytics Solutions segment supplies mission critical information, technology solutions, and real-world solutions and services to the firm's life science clients. The Research and Development Solutions segment provides outsourced clinical research and clinical trial related services. The Contract Sales and Medical Solutions segment offers health care provider and patient engagement services to both biopharmaceutical customers and the healthcare market. The company was founded by Dennis B. Gillings and Gary Koch in 1982 and is headquartered in Durham, NC.
info.description_zh: IQVIA Holdings, Inc. 致力於為生命科學產業提供分析、技術解決方案和臨床研究服務。它透過以下部門運作：技術和分析解決方案、研究和開發解決方案以及合約銷售和醫療解決方案。技術和分析解決方案部門為公司的生命科學客戶提供關鍵任務資訊、技術解決方案以及實際解決方案和服務。研究和開發解決方案部門提供外包臨床研究和臨床試驗相關服務。合約銷售和醫療解決方案部門為生物製藥客戶和醫療保健市場提供醫療保健提供者和患者參與服務。該公司由 Dennis B. Gillings 和 Gary Koch 於 1982 年創立，總部位於北卡羅來納州達勒姆。

info.description: Colgate-Palmolive Co. engages in the manufacturing and distribution of consumer products. It operates through the Oral, Personal, and Home Care, and Pet Nutrition segments. The Oral, Personal, and Home Care segment includes toothpaste, toothbrushes, mouthwash, bar and liquid hand soaps, shower gels, shampoos, conditioners, deodorants and antiperspirants, skin health products, dishwashing detergents, fabric conditioners, household cleaners, and other similar items. The Pet Nutrition segment offers specialty pet nutrition products manufactured and marketed by Hill's Pet Nutrition. The company was founded by William Colgate in 1806 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: 高露潔棕欖公司從事消費品的製造業及分銷。它透過口腔、個人和家庭護理以及寵物營養部門運作。口腔、個人和家庭護理部分包括牙膏、牙刷、漱口水、皂條和洗手液、沐浴露、洗髮精、護髮素、除臭劑和止汗劑、皮膚保健品、餐具洗滌劑、織物調理劑、家用清潔劑和其他類似產品。寵物營養部門提供由 Hill's Pet Nutrition 製造和銷售的特殊寵物營養產品。該公司由 William Colgate 於 1806 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: The Walt Disney Co. engages in the business of international family entertainment and media enterprise. It owns and operates television and radio production, distribution and broadcasting stations, direct-to-consumer services, amusement parks, and hotels. It operates through the following business segments: Disney Entertainment, ESPN, and Disney Parks, Experiences, and Products. The company was founded by Walter Elias Disney on October 16, 1923 and is headquartered in Burbank, CA.
info.description_zh: 華特迪士尼公司從事國際家庭娛樂和媒體業務。它擁有並經營電視和廣播製作、發行和廣播電台、直接面向消費者的服務、遊樂園和酒店。它透過以下業務部門運作：迪士尼娛樂、ESPN 以及迪士尼樂園、體驗和產品。該公司由沃爾特·埃利亞斯·迪士尼 (Walter Elias Disney) 於 1923 年 10 月 16 日創立，總部位於加利福尼亞州伯班克。

info.description: Healthpeak Properties, Inc. is a Standard & Poor's 500 company, which engages in acquiring, developing, owning, leasing, and managing healthcare real estate across the United States. It operates through the following segments: Lab, Outpatient Medical, Continuing Care Retirement Community (CCRC), and Other Non-Reportable. The Lab segment refers to lab properties, which contain laboratory and office space. The Outpatient Medical segment includes outpatient medical buildings and hospitals. The CCRC segment deals with retirement communities that include independent living, assisted living, memory care, and skilled nursing units. The Other Non-Reportable segment consists of an unconsolidated joint venture with a sovereign wealth fund that owns 19 senior housing assets and loans receivable. The company was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Denver, CO.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 醫療保健設施
info.description_zh: Healthpeak Properties, Inc. 是一家標準普爾 500 強公司，在美國各地從事收購、開發、擁有、租賃和管理醫療保健房地產。它透過以下部門運作：實驗室、門診醫療、持續照護退休社區 (CCRC) 和其他非報告部門。實驗室部分是指實驗室財產，其中包含實驗室和辦公空間。門診醫療部門包括門診醫療大樓和醫院。 CCRC 部門涉及退休社區，包括獨立生活、輔助生活、記憶護理和熟練護理單位。其他非報告部門由與主權財富基金成立的未合併合資企業組成，該基金擁有 19 項高級住房資產和應收貸款。該公司成立於 1985 年，總部位於科羅拉多州丹佛市。

info.description: Oracle Corp. engages in the provision of products and services that address aspects of corporate information technology environments, including applications and infrastructure technologies. It operates through the following business segments: Cloud and License, Hardware, and Services. The Cloud and License segment markets, sells, and delivers enterprise applications and infrastructure technologies through cloud and on-premise deployment models including cloud services and license support offerings. The Hardware segment provides infrastructure technologies including Oracle Engineered Systems, servers, storage, industry-specific hardware, operating systems, virtualization, management, and other hardware-related software. The Services segment offers consulting, advanced support, and education services. The company was founded by Lawrence Joseph Ellison, Robert Nimrod Miner, and Edward A. Oates on June 16, 1977 and is headquartered in Austin, TX.
info.description_zh: Oracle Corp. 提供解決企業資訊科技環境各方面問題的產品和服務，包括應用程式和基礎架構技術。它透過以下業務部門運作：雲端和授權、硬體和服務。雲端和許可證部門透過雲端和本地部署模型（包括雲端服務和許可證支援產品）行銷、銷售和交付企業應用程式和基礎設施技術。硬體部門提供基礎設施技術，包括 Oracle 工程系統、伺服器、儲存、行業特定硬體、作業系統、虛擬化、管理和其他硬體相關軟體。服務部門提供諮詢、高階支援和教育服務。該公司由 Lawrence Joseph Ellison、Robert Nimrod Miner 和 Edward A. Oates 於 1977 年 6 月 16 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州奧斯汀。

info.description: Revvity, Inc. provides health science solutions, technologies, expertise, and services that deliver complete workflows from discovery to development, and diagnosis to cure. It focuses on translational multi-omics technologies, biomarker identification, imaging, prediction, screening, detection and diagnosis, and informatics. The firm operates through the following segments: Life Sciences and Diagnostics. The Life Sciences segment delivers innovative solutions to optimize workflows, boost productivity, and accelerate drug discovery and development. The Diagnostics segment provides instruments, reagents, assay platforms, and software to healthcare and research professionals, with a focus on reproductive health, immunodiagnostics, emerging market diagnostics, and applied genomics to enhance patient outcomes. Revvity was founded on April 19, 1937 and is headquartered in Waltham, MA.
info.description_zh: Revvity, Inc. 提供健康科學解決方案、技術、專業知識和服務，提供從發現到開發、從診斷到治癒的完整工作流程。它專注於轉化多組學技術、生物標記識別、成像、預測、篩選、檢測和診斷以及資訊學。該公司透過以下部門運作：生命科學和診斷。生命科學部門提供創新的解決方案來優化工作流程、提高生產力並加速藥物發現和開發。診斷部門為醫療保健和研究專業人員提供儀器、試劑、分析平台和軟體，重點在於生殖健康、免疫診斷、新興市場診斷和應用基因組學，以提高患者的治療效果。 Revvity 成立於 1937 年 4 月 19 日，總部位於馬薩諸塞州沃爾瑟姆。

info.description: First Solar, Inc. is a solar technology company, which engages in the provision of solar modules. It is involved in the design, manufacture, and sale of cadmium tellurid (CdTe) solar modules, which convert sunlight into electricity. The company was founded by Michael J. Ahearn in 1999 and is headquartered in Phoenix, AZ.
info.description_zh: First Solar, Inc.是一家太陽能技術公司，從事提供太陽能模組業務。該公司從事碲化鎘（CdTe）太陽能組件的設計、製造和銷售，該組件可將陽光轉化為電能。該公司由 Michael J. Ahearn 於 1999 年創立，總部位於亞利桑那州菲尼克斯。

info.description: Expeditors International of Washington, Inc. engages in the provision of global logistics services. It operates through the following geographical segments: United States, Other North America, Latin America, North Asia, South Asia, Europe, and Middle East, Africa, and India. It offers air freight, ocean freight and ocean and customs brokerage and other services. It also provides customer solutions such as order management, time-definite transportation, warehousing and distribution, temperature-controlled transit, cargo insurance and customized logistics solutions. The company was founded by John M. Kaiser, Peter Rose, Wang Li Kou, Kevin Walsh, Hank Wong, George Ho, Robert Chiarito, and Glenn Alger in 1979 and is headquartered in Bellevue, WA.
info.description_zh: Expeditors International of Washington, Inc. 從事提供全球物流服務。該公司透過以下地理區域開展業務：美國、北美其他地區、拉丁美洲、北亞、南亞、歐洲、中東、非洲和印度。它提供空運、海運以及海運和報關等服務。它還為客戶提供訂單管理、限時運輸、倉儲配送、溫控運輸、貨物保險和客製化物流解決方案等解決方案。該公司由 John M. Kaiser、Peter Rose、Wang Li Kou、Kevin Walsh、Hank Wong、George Ho、Robert Chiarito 和 Glenn Alger 於 1979 年創立，總部位於華盛頓州貝爾維尤。

info.description: Alliant Energy Corp. engages in the provision of regulated electricity and natural gas service to natural gas customers in the Midwest through its two public utility subsidiaries. It operates through the Utility and ATC Holdings, Non-Utility, Parent, and Other segments. The Utility segment includes the operations of IPL and WPL, which primarily serve retail customers in Iowa and Wisconsin. The ATC Holdings, Non-Utility, Parent, and Other segment refers to the operations of AEF and its subsidiaries, Corporate Services, the Alliant Energy parent company, and any Alliant Energy parent company consolidating adjustments. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Madison, WI.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 受監管的電力
info.description_zh: Alliant Energy Corp. 透過其兩家公用事業子公司向中西部的天然氣客戶提供受監管的電力和天然氣服務。它透過公用事業和 ATC Holdings、非公用事業、母公司和其他部門進行運作。公用事業部門包括 IPL 和 WPL 的業務，主要為愛荷華州和威斯康辛州的零售客戶提供服務。 ATC Holdings、非公用事業、母公司和其他部門是指 AEF 及其子公司、企業服務、Alliant Energy 母公司以及任何 Alliant Energy 母公司合併調整的業務。該公司成立於 1981 年，總部位於威斯康辛州麥迪遜。

info.description: Xcel Energy, Inc. is an electric and natural gas delivery company. It operates through the following three segments: Regulated Electric, Regulated Natural Gas Utility and All Others. The Regulated Electric segment focuses on generating, purchasing, transmitting, and distributing electricity. The Regulated Natural Gas Utility segment includes purchases, transport, stores, distribution, and sales. The All Others segment involves steam, appliance repair services, non-utility real estate activities, revenues associated with processing solid waste into refuse-derived fuel, investments in rental housing projects that qualify for low-income housing tax credits and equity method investments in energy impact partners funds. The company was founded in 1909 and is headquartered in Minneapolis, MN.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 受監管的電力
info.description_zh: Xcel Energy, Inc. 是一家電力和天然氣輸送公司。它透過以下三個部門運作：監管電力部門、監管天然氣公用事業部門和所有其他部門。監管電力部門專注於發電、購買、傳輸和分配電力。受監管的天然氣公用事業部門包括採購、運輸、儲存、分銷和銷售。所有其他部門涉及蒸汽、家電維修服務、非公用事業房地產活動、與將固體廢物加工成垃圾衍生燃料相關的收入、對符合低收入住房稅收抵免資格的租賃住房項目的投資以及對能源影響合作夥伴基金的權益法投資。該公司成立於 1909 年，總部位於明尼蘇達州明尼阿波利斯。

info.description: Textron, Inc. is a multi-industry company, which leverages a global network of aircraft, defense, industrial, and finance businesses to customers. It operates through the following segments: Textron Aviation, Bell, Textron Systems, Industrial, Textron eAviation, and Finance. The Textron Aviation segment manufactures, sells, and services Beechcraft and Cessna aircraft. The Bell segment supplies military and commercial helicopters, tiltrotor aircraft, and related spare parts. The Textron Systems segment develops, manufactures, and integrates a variety of products and services for United States and international military. The Industrial segment designs and manufactures a variety of products within the Kautex and specialized vehicles product lines. The Textron eAviation segment covers pipistrel along with other research and development initiatives related to sustainable aviation solutions. The company was founded by Royal Little in 1923 and is headquartered in Providence, RI.
info.description_zh: 德事隆公司是一家跨產業公司，為客戶提供飛機、國防、工業和金融業務的全球網路。該公司透過以下部門運作：德事隆航空部門、貝爾部門、德事隆系統部門、工業部門、德事隆電子航空部門和金融部門。德事隆航空部門製造、銷售 Beechcraft 和 Cessna 飛機並提供服務。貝爾部門供應軍用和商用直升機、傾轉旋翼機以及相關零件。德事隆系統部門為美國和國際軍隊開發、製造和整合各種產品和服務。工業部門設計和製造考特斯和專用車輛產品線中的各種產品。德事隆 eAviation 部門涵蓋 pipistrel 以及與永續航空解決方案相關的其他研發計劃。該公司由 Royal Little 於 1923 年創立，總部位於羅德島州普羅維登斯。

info.description: The Williams Cos., Inc. operates as an energy infrastructure company, which explores, produces, transports, sells and processes natural gas and petroleum products. It operates through the following segments: Transmission and Gulf of Mexico, Northeast G&P, and West. The Transmission and Gulf of Mexico segment consists of interstate natural gas pipelines, the Transco and Northwest Pipelines, as well as natural gas gathering and processing and crude oil production handling and transportation assets in the Gulf Coast region. The Northeast G&P segment includes midstream gathering, processing, and fractionation businesses in the Marcellus Shale region primarily in Pennsylvania and New York, and the Utica Shale region of eastern Ohio. The West segment consists of gas gathering, processing, and treating operations in the Rocky Mountain region of Colorado and Wyoming, the Barnett Shale region of north-central Texas, the Eagle Ford Shale region of south Texas, the Haynesville Shale region of northwest Louisiana, and the Mid-Continent region which includes the Anadarko, Arkoma, and Permian basins. The company was founded by David Williams and Miller Williams in 1908 and is headquartered in Tulsa, OK.
info.description_zh: Williams Cos., Inc. 是一家能源基礎設施公司，從事天然氣和石油產品的勘探、生產、運輸、銷售和加工。該公司透過以下部門運作：傳輸和墨西哥灣部門、東北 G&P 部門和西部部門。傳輸和墨西哥灣部分包括州際天然氣管道、Transco 和西北管道，以及墨西哥灣沿岸地區的天然氣收集和加工以及原油生產處理和運輸資產。 Northeast G&P 部門包括主要位於賓夕法尼亞州和紐約州的馬塞勒斯頁岩地區以及俄亥俄州東部的尤蒂卡頁岩地區的中游收集、加工和分餾業務。西段包括科羅拉多州和懷俄明州落基山地區、德克薩斯州中北部巴尼特頁岩地區、德克薩斯州南部伊格爾福特頁岩地區、路易斯安那州西北部海恩斯維爾頁岩地區以及包括阿納達科盆地、阿科馬盆地和二疊紀盆地在內的中大陸地區的天然氣收集、加工和處理業務。該公司由 David Williams 和 Miller Williams 於 1908 年創立，總部位於俄克拉荷馬州塔爾薩。

info.description: Targa Resources Corp. engages in the business of gathering, compressing, treating, processing, transporting, and purchasing and selling natural gas. It operates through the following segments: Gathering and Processing, and Logistics and Transportation, and Other. The Gathering and Processing segment includes assets used in the gathering, and purchase and sale of natural gas produced from oil and gas wells. The Logistics and Transportation segment refers to the activities and assets necessary to convert mixed natural gas liquids (NGLs) into NGL products. The Other contains the results of commodity derivative activity mark-to-market gains and losses related to derivative contracts. The company was founded on October 27, 2005 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.description_zh: Targa Resources Corp. 從事天然氣採集、壓縮、處理、加工、運輸以及採購和銷售業務。它透過以下部門運作：收集和加工部門、物流和運輸部門以及其他部門。收集和加工部門包括用於收集、購買和銷售石油和天然氣井生產的天然氣的資產。物流和運輸部門是指將混合天然氣液體（NGL）轉化為 NGL 產品所需的活動和資產。其他包含與衍生性商品合約相關的商品衍生性商品活動以市價計價的損益結果。該公司成立於2005年10月27日，總部位於德州休士頓。

info.description: AutoZone, Inc. engages in the retail and distribution of automotive replacement parts and accessories. It operates under the Auto Part Stores and Other segments. The company was founded by Joseph R. Hyde, III in 1979 and is headquartered in Memphis, TN.
info.description_zh: AutoZone, Inc. 從事汽車更換零件和配件的零售和分銷。它在汽車配件商店和其他部門下運作。該公司由 Joseph R. Hyde, III 於 1979 年創立，總部位於田納西州孟菲斯。

info.description: Visa, Inc. engages in the provision of digital payment services. It also facilitates global commerce through the transfer of value and information among a global network of consumers, merchants, financial institutions, businesses, strategic partners, and government entities. It offers debit cards, credit cards, prepaid products, commercial payment solutions, and global automated teller machines. The company was founded by Dee Hock in 1958 and is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: Visa, Inc. 從事提供數位支付服務。它還透過消費者、商人、金融機構、企業、戰略合作夥伴和政府實體的全球網絡之間的價值和資訊轉移來促進全球商業。它提供借記卡、信用卡、預付費產品、商業支付解決方案和全球自動櫃員機。該公司由 Dee Hock 於 1958 年創立，總部位於加州舊金山。

info.description: DTE Energy Co. operates as a diversified energy company, which engages in the development and management of energy-related businesses and services. It operates through the following segments: Electric, Gas, DTE Vantage, Energy Trading, and Corporate and Other. The Electric segment consists of generation, purchase, distribution, and sale of electricity to residential, commercial, and industrial customers in southeastern Michigan. The Gas segment is involved in the purchase, storage, transportation, distribution, and sale of natural gas to residential, commercial, and industrial customers throughout Michigan, and the sale of storage and transportation capacity. The DTE Vantage segment focuses on projects that deliver energy and utility-type products and services to industrial, commercial, and institutional customers, produce reduced emissions fuel, and sell electricity and pipeline-quality gas from renewable energy projects. The Energy Trading segment covers energy marketing and trading operations. The Corporate and Other segment includes various holding company activities, holds certain non-utility debt, and holds certain investments, as well as funds supporting regional development and economic growth. The company was founded in January 1995 and is headquartered in Detroit, MI.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 受監管的電力
info.description_zh: DTE Energy Co.是一家多元化能源公司，從事能源相關業務和服務的開發和管理。該公司透過以下部門運作：電力部門、天然氣部門、DTE Vantage 部門、能源貿易部門以及企業及其他部門。電力部門包括向密西根州東南部的住宅、商業和工業客戶發電、購買、分配和銷售電力。天然氣部門涉及向密西根州各地的住宅、商業和工業客戶購買、儲存、運輸、分銷和銷售天然氣，以及銷售儲存和運輸能力。 DTE Vantage 部門專注於向工業、商業和機構客戶提供能源和公用事業型產品和服務、生產減少排放的燃料以及銷售來自再生能源專案的電力和管道品質天然氣的專案。能源貿易部門涵蓋能源行銷和貿易業務。公司及其他部門包括各種控股公司活動，持有某些非公用事業債務，並持有某些投資以及支持區域發展和經濟成長的基金。該公司成立於 1995 年 1 月，總部位於密西根州底特律。

info.description: Mastercard, Inc. is a technology company, which engages in the provision of payment solutions for the development and implementation of credit, debit, prepaid, commercial, and payment programs through its brands including Mastercard, Maestro, and Cirrus. It also offers cyber and intelligence solutions. The company was founded in November 1966 and is headquartered in Purchase, NY.
info.description_zh: Mastercard, Inc. 是一家科技公司，透過其 Mastercard、Maestro 和 Cirrus 等品牌提供支付解決方案，用於開發和實施信用卡、金融卡、預付、商業和支付程序。它還提供網路和情報解決方案。該公司成立於 1966 年 11 月，總部位於紐約州普切斯。

info.description: Jacobs Solutions, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the designing and deployment of technology-centric solutions. It operates through the following business segments: Infrastructure and Advanced Facilities, and PA Consulting. The Infrastructure and Advanced Facilities segment includes solutions for complex challenges related to energy security, environmental resilience, safe and reliable transportation, buildings and infrastructure, integrated water management and biopharmaceutical manufacturing. The PA Consulting segment includes the investment in PA Consulting Group. The company was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Dallas, TX.
info.description_zh: Jacobs Solutions, Inc.是一家控股公司，從事以技術為中心的解決方案的設計和部署。它透過以下業務部門運作：基礎設施和先進設施以及 PA 諮詢。基礎設施和先進設施部門包括針對能源安全、環境彈性、安全可靠的交通、建築和基礎設施、綜合水管理和生物製藥製造等複雜挑戰的解決方案。 PA Consulting 部門包括對 PA Consulting Group 的投資。該公司成立於 1947 年，總部位於德克薩斯州達拉斯。

info.description: APA Corp. explores for oil and natural gas through its subsidiaries. It produces oil and gas with operations in the United States, Egypt and the United Kingdom, and exploration activities offshore in Suriname. The company was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣勘探與生產
info.description_zh: APA Corp. 透過其子公司勘探石油和天然氣。該公司生產石油和天然氣，在美國、埃及和英國開展業務，並在蘇利南進行海上勘探活動。該公司成立於 1954 年，總部位於德克薩斯州休斯頓。

info.description: Verisk Analytics, Inc. engages in the provision of data, analytics, and technology services. The firm also offers predictive analytics and decision support solutions to clients in rating, underwriting, claims, catastrophe, and weather risk fields. It operates through the Insurance segment. The Insurance segment offers fraud-detection solutions including review of data on claim histories, analysis of claims to find emerging patterns of fraud, and identification of suspicious claims in the insurance sector and offers solutions and services primarily through annual subscriptions or long-term agreements. The company was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Jersey City, NJ.
info.description_zh: Verisk Analytics, Inc. 從事提供數據、分析和技術服務。該公司還為評級、承保、索賠、災難和天氣風險領域的客戶提供預測分析和決策支援解決方案。它透過保險部門運作。保險部門提供詐欺偵測解決方案，包括審查索賠歷史數據、分析索賠以發現新出現的詐欺模式以及識別保險領域的可疑索賠，並主要透過年度訂閱或長期協議提供解決方案和服務。該公司成立於 1971 年，總部位於新澤西州澤西市。

info.description: Akamai Technologies, Inc. engages in the provision of cloud services for delivering, optimizing, and securing content and business applications over the Internet. Its products include security, web performance, media delivery, and network operator. The company was founded by Frank T. Leighton, Jonathan Seelig, Randall S. Kaplan, and Daniel M. Lewin on August 20, 1998 and is headquartered in Cambridge, MA.
info.description_zh: Akamai Technologies, Inc. 致力於提供雲端服務，以透過網路交付、優化和保護內容和業務應用程式。其產品包括安全性、網路效能、媒體交付和網路營運商。該公司由 Frank T. Leighton、Jonathan Seelig、Randall S. Kaplan 和 Daniel M. Lewin 於 1998 年 8 月 20 日創立，總部位於麻薩諸塞州劍橋。

info.description: Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. designs, develops, and markets integrated power semiconductor solutions and power delivery architectures for computing and storage, automotive, industrial, communications, and consumer applications markets. The firm's products include portable electronic devices, wireless LAN access points, computers and notebooks, monitors, infotainment applications, and medical equipment. It operates through the following geographical segments: China, US, Taiwan, and Other. The company was founded by Michael R. Hsing, and James C. Moyer on August 22, 1997, and is headquartered in West Palm Beach, FL.
info.description_zh: Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. 為運算和儲存、汽車、工業、通訊和消費應用市場設計、開發和銷售整合式功率半導體解決方案和電力傳輸架構。該公司的產品包括便攜式電子設備、無線區域網路存取點、電腦和筆記型電腦、顯示器、資訊娛樂應用和醫療設備。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：中國、美國、台灣和其他地區。該公司由 Michael R. Hsing 和 James C. Moyer 於 1997 年 8 月 22 日創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州西棕櫚灘。

info.description: eBay, Inc. is a commerce company, whose platforms include an online marketplace and its localized counterparts, including off-platform businesses in South Korea, Japan, and Turkey, as well as eBay's suite of mobile apps. It offers a platform for various product categories, including parts and accessories, collectibles, fashion, electronics, and home & garden. eBay generates revenue mainly through fees from sales, payment processing, and advertising. The company was founded by Pierre Morad Omidyar in September 1995 and is headquartered in San Jose, CA.
info.description_zh: eBay, Inc. 是一家商業公司，其平台包括線上市場及其在地化對應平台，包括韓國、日本和土耳其的平台外業務以及 eBay 的行動應用程式套件。它为各种产品类别提供了一个平台，包括零件和配件、收藏品、时尚、电子产品以及家居和花园。 eBay 主要通过销售、支付处理和广告费用产生收入。该公司由 Pierre Morad Omidyar 于 1995 年 9 月创立，总部位于加利福尼亚州圣何塞。

info.description: Biogen, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company, which engages in discovering, developing, and delivering therapies for neurological and neurodegenerative diseases. Its products include TECFIDERA, VUMERITY, AVONEX, PLEGRIDY, TYSABRI, and FAMPYRA for the treatment of MS, SPINRAZA for the treatment of SMA, ADUHELM for the treatment of Alzheimer's disease, and FUMADERM for the treatment of severe plaque psoriasis. The company was founded by Charles Weissmann, Heinz Schaller, Kenneth Murray, Walter Gilbert, and Phillip Allen Sharp in 1978 and is headquartered in Cambridge, MA.
info.description_zh: Biogen, Inc. 是一家生物製藥公司，致力於發現、開發和提供神經系統和神經退化性疾病的治療方法。其產品包括用於治療多發性硬化症的TECFIDERA、VUMERITY、AVONEX、PLEGRIDY、TYSABRI和FAMPYRA，用於治療SMA的SPINRAZA，用於治療阿茲海默症的ADUHELM，以及用於治療嚴重斑塊狀乾癬的FUMADERM。該公司由 Charles Weissmann、Heinz Schaller、Kenneth Murray、Walter Gilbert 和 Phillip Allen Sharp 於 1978 年創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州劍橋。

info.description: Autodesk, Inc. engages in the design of software and services. Its products include AutoCAD, BIM Collaborate Pro, Revit, Civil 3D, Fusion 360, InfraWorks, Inventor, Maya, PlanGrid, Revit, Shotgun, and 3ds Max. The firm also offers product development and manufacturing software, which provides manufacturers in the automotive, transportation, industrial machinery, consumer products, and building product industries with digital design, engineering, and production solutions. The firm is also involved in digital media and entertainment, which consists of tools for digital sculpting, modeling, animation, effects, rendering, and compositing for design visualization, visual effects, and games production. The company was founded by John Walker in April 1982 and is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: Autodesk, Inc. 從事軟體和服務設計。其產品包括 AutoCAD、BIM Collaborate Pro、Revit、Civil 3D、Fusion 360、InfraWorks、Inventor、Maya、PlanGrid、Revit、Shotgun 和 3ds Max。該公司還提供產品開發和製造軟體，為汽車、運輸、工業機械、消費品和建築產品行業的製造商提供數位設計、工程和生產解決方案。該公司還涉足數位媒體和娛樂領域，其中包括用於設計視覺化、視覺效果和遊戲製作的數位雕刻、建模、動畫、效果、渲染和合成工具。該公司由 John Walker 於 1982 年 4 月創立，總部位於加州舊金山。

info.description: Halliburton Co. engages in the provision of products and services to the energy industry. It operates through the Completion and Production, and Drilling and Evaluation segments. The Completion and Production segment focuses on cementing, stimulation, specialty chemicals, intervention, pressure control, artificial lift, and completion products and services. The Drilling and Evaluation segment provides field and reservoir modeling, drilling, fluids, evaluation, and wellbore placement solutions that enable customers to model, measure, drill, and optimize well construction activities. The company was founded by Erle P. Halliburton in 1919 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣設備與服務
info.description_zh: 哈里伯頓公司從事為能源產業提供產品和服務。它透過完井和生產以及鑽井和評估部門運作。完井和生產部門專注於固井、增產、特殊化學品、幹預、壓力控制、人工舉升以及完井產品和服務。鑽井和評估部門提供現場和油藏建模、鑽井、流體、評估和井眼佈置解決方案，使客戶能夠建模、測量、鑽井和優化建井活動。該公司由 Erle P. Halliburton 於 1919 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州休斯頓。

info.description: Automatic Data Processing, Inc. engages in the provision of business outsourcing solutions in cloud-based human capital management. It operates through the following business segments: Employer Services, Professional Employer Organization Services, and Other. The Employer Services segment provides clients from single-employee small businesses to large enterprises offering human resources outsourcing and technology-based human capital management solutions and cloud-based platforms. The Professional Employer Organization Services segment offers small and mid-sized businesses a human resource outsourcing solution through a co-employment mode. The Other segment includes the certain corporate overhead charges and expenses that have not been allocated to the reportable segments. The company was founded by Henry Taub in 1949 and is headquartered in Roseland, NJ.
info.description_zh: 自動資料處理公司致力於提供基於雲端的人力資本管理的業務外包解決方案。它透過以下業務部門運作：雇主服務、專業雇主組織服務和其他。雇主服務部門為從單一員工的小型企業到大型企業的客戶提供人力資源外包和基於技術的人力資本管理解決方案和基於雲端的平台。專業雇主組織服務部門透過共同僱用模式為中小企業提供人力資源外包解決方案。其他分部包括未分配至可報告分部的某些公司間接費用和開支。該公司由 Henry Taub 於 1949 年創立，總部位於新澤西州羅斯蘭。

info.description: Phillips 66 engages in the processing, transportation, storage, and marketing of fuels and other related products. The company operates through the following segments: Midstream, Chemicals, Refining, Renewable Fuels, Marketing and Specialties, and Corporate and Other. The Midstream segment provides crude oil and refined products transportation, terminal, and processing services, as well as natural gas, natural gas liquids, and liquefied petroleum gas transportation, storage, processing, and marketing services. The Chemicals segment produces and markets petrochemicals and plastics worldwide. The Refining segment refines crude oil and other feedstocks into petroleum products such as gasoline, distillates, and aviation fuels. The Marketing and Specialties segment purchases for resale and markets refined petroleum products such as base oils and lubricants, and power generation operations. The Renewable Fuels segment processes renewable feedstocks into renewable products at the Rodeo Renewable Energy Complex (Rodeo Complex) and at Humber Refinery. The company was founded in 1875 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油與天然氣精煉與行銷
info.description_zh: Phillips 66 從事燃料及其他相關產品的加工、運輸、儲存和行銷。該公司透過以下部門運作：中游部門、化學品部門、煉油部門、再生燃料部門、行銷和特殊部門以及企業和其他部門。中游部門提供原油和成品油運輸、碼頭和加工服務，以及天然氣、液化天然氣和液化石油氣運輸、儲存、加工和行銷服務。化學品部門在全球範圍內生產和銷售石化產品和塑膠。煉油部門將原油和其他原料精煉成汽油、餾分油和航空燃料等石油產品。行銷和特種產品部門採購轉售和行銷精煉石油產品，如基礎油和潤滑油，以及發電業務。再生燃料部門在 Rodeo 再生能源綜合體（Rodeo Complex）和 Humber 煉油廠將再生原料加工成再生產品。該公司成立於 1875 年，總部位於德克薩斯州休斯頓。

info.description: EOG Resources, Inc. engages in the exploration, development, production and marketing of crude oil and natural gas. It operates through the United States, Trinidad, and Other International geographical segments. The Other International segment includes China and Canada operations. The company was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣勘探與生產
info.description_zh: EOG Resources, Inc.從事原油和天然氣的勘探、開發、生產和行銷。它透過美國、特立尼達和其他國際地理部門開展業務。其他國際部門包括中國和加拿大業務。該公司成立於 1985 年，總部位於德克薩斯州休士頓。

info.description: ONEOK, Inc. engages in gathering, processing, fractionating, transporting, storing and marketing of natural gas. It operates through the following segments: Natural Gas Gathering and Processing, Natural Gas Liquids and Natural Gas Pipelines. The Natural Gas Gathering and Processing segment offers midstream services to producers in North Dakota, Montana, Wyoming, Kansas and Oklahoma. The Natural Gas Liquids segment owns and operates facilities that gather, fractionate, treat and distribute NGLs and store NGL products, in Oklahoma, Kansas, Texas, New Mexico and the Rocky Mountain region, which includes the Williston, Powder River and DJ Basins, where it provides midstream services to producers of NGLs and deliver those products to the two market centers, one in the Mid-Continent in Conway, Kansas and the other in the Gulf Coast in Mont Belvieu, Texas. The Natural Gas Pipelines segment provides transportation and storage services to end users. The company was founded in 1906 and is headquartered in Tulsa, OK.
info.description_zh: ONEOK, Inc. 從事天然氣的收集、加工、分餾、運輸、儲存和行銷。它透過以下部門運作：天然氣收集和加工、液化天然氣和天然氣管道。天然氣收集和加工部門為北達科他州、蒙大拿州、懷俄明州、堪薩斯州和俄克拉荷馬州的生產商提供中游服務。液化天然氣部門在俄克拉荷馬州、堪薩斯州、德克薩斯州、新墨西哥州和落基山脈地區（包括威利斯頓盆地、粉河流域和DJ盆地）擁有並經營收集、分餾、處理和分銷液化天然氣以及儲存液化天然氣產品的設施，在這些地區為液化天然氣生產商提供中游服務，並將這些產品運送到兩個市場中心，一個位於堪薩斯州康威的中大陸，另一個位於堪薩斯州康威的天然氣管道部門為最終用戶提供運輸和儲存服務。該公司成立於 1906 年，總部位於俄克拉荷馬州塔爾薩。

info.description: Tyler Technologies, Inc. engages in the provision of integrated technology and management solutions and services for the public sector with a focus on local governments. It operates through the following segments: Enterprise Software and Platform Technologies. The Enterprise Software segment provides public sector entities with software systems to meet their information technology and automation needs for mission-critical back-office functions such as financial management, courts and justice processes. The Platform Technologies (PT) segment provides public sector entities with software solutions to platform and transformative solutions including digital solutions, payment processing, streamline data processing, and improve operations and workflows. The company was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Plano, TX.
info.description_zh: Tyler Technologies, Inc. 致力於為公共部門（重點是地方政府）提供整合技術和管理解決方案及服務。它透過以下部門運作：企業軟體和平台技術。企業軟體部門為公共部門實體提供軟體系統，以滿足其對財務管理、法院和司法程序等關鍵任務後台功能的資訊技術和自動化需求。平台技術（PT）部門為公共部門實體提供平台軟體解決方案和變革性解決方案，包括數位解決方案、支付處理、簡化資料處理以及改善營運和工作流程。該公司成立於 1966 年，總部位於德克薩斯州普萊諾。

info.description: The Estee Lauder Companies, Inc. engages in the manufacture of skin care, makeup, fragrance and hair care products. It sells products under Estee Lauder, Clinique, Origins, MAC, Bobbi Brown, La Mer, Jo Malone London, Aveda and Too Faced. The company was founded by Estee Lauder and Joseph Lauder in 1946 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: 雅詩蘭黛公司從事護膚、化妝品、香水和護髮產品的製造。該公司銷售雅詩蘭黛、倩碧、Origins、MAC、Bobbi Brown、La Mer、Jo Malone London、Aveda 和 Too Faced 品牌的產品。該公司由雅詩蘭黛和約瑟夫蘭黛於 1946 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: General Dynamics Corp. is a global aerospace and defense company, which engages in design, engineering, and manufacturing to deliver solutions. It operates through the following business segments: Aerospace, Marine Systems, Combat Systems, and Technologies. The Aerospace segment includes the production of business jets, technology aircraft, repair, support and completion services. The Marine Systems segment involves the design and building of nuclear-powered submarines, surface combatant, and auxiliary ship design and construction. The Combat Systems segment focuses on manufacturing and integrating land combat solutions, wheeled and tracked combat vehicles, weapons systems, and munitions. The Technologies segment consists of services, technologies, and products for electronic hardware with its software. The company was founded on February 21, 1952 and is headquartered in Reston, VA.
info.description_zh: 通用動力公司是一家全球航空航太和國防公司，從事設計、工程和製造以提供解決方案。它透過以下業務部門運作：航空航太、海洋系統、作戰系統和技術。航空航天部門包括公務機、技術飛機的生產、維修、支援和完工服務。海洋系統部門涉及核動力潛艇、水面作戰艦艇的設計和建造以及輔助艦艇的設計和建造。作戰系統部門專注於製造和整合陸地作戰解決方案、輪式和履帶式作戰車輛、武器系統和彈藥。技術部門包括電子硬體及其軟體的服務、技術和產品。該公司成立於 1952 年 2 月 21 日，總部位於維吉尼亞州雷斯頓。

info.description: Eli Lilly & Co. engages in the discovery, development, manufacture, and sale of pharmaceutical products. The firm's products include diabetes, oncology, immunology, neuroscience, and other products and therapies. The company was founded by Eli Lilly on May 10, 1876 and is headquartered in Indianapolis, IN.
info.description_zh: 禮來公司 (Eli Lilly & Co.) 從事醫藥產品的發現、開發、製造和銷售。該公司的產品包括糖尿病、腫瘤學、免疫學、神經科學以及其他產品和療法。該公司由禮來公司於 1876 年 5 月 10 日創立，總部位於印第安納州印第安納波利斯。

info.description: Waters Corp. engages in the provision of workflow solutions involving liquid chromatography, mass spectrometry, and thermal analysis. It operates through the Waters and TA (TA Instruments) segments. The Waters segment consists of liquid chromatography instruments, mass spectrometry, and precision chemistry consumable products and services. The TA segment products and services include thermal analysis, rheometry and calorimetry instrument systems, and service sales. The company was founded by James Logan Waters in 1958 and is headquartered in Milford, MA.
info.description_zh: Waters Corp. 提供涉及液相層析、質譜和熱分析的工作流程解決方案。它透過 Waters 和 TA (TA Instruments) 部門運作。沃特世部門包括液相層析儀器、質譜儀以及精密化學消耗品和服務。 TA 部門的產品和服務包括熱分析、流變和量熱儀器系統以及服務銷售。該公司由 James Logan Waters 於 1958 年創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州米爾福德。

info.description: Verizon Communications, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of communications, information, and entertainment products and services. It operates through the Consumer and Business segments. The Consumer segment provides consumer-focused wireless and wire line communications services and products. The Business segment offers wireless and wireline communications services and products, including FWA broadband, data, video and conferencing services, corporate networking solutions, security and managed network services, local and long-distance voice services, and network access to deliver various IoT services and products. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Verizon Communications, Inc. 是一家控股公司，從事提供通訊、資訊和娛樂產品及服務。它透過消費者和商業部門運作。消費者部門提供以消費者為中心的無線和有線通訊服務和產品。該業務部門提供無線和有線通訊服務和產品，包括FWA寬頻、數據、視訊和會議服務、企業網路解決方案、安全和託管網路服務、本地和長途語音服務以及提供各種物聯網服務和產品的網路存取。該公司成立於1983年，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: American International Group, Inc. is a global insurance organization, which provides property casualty insurance, offering a range of products, including liability, financial lines, property, global specialty, personal lines and accident and health that help businesses, individuals and jurisdictions to protect their assets and manage risks through AIG operations and network partners. It operates through the following segments: North America Commercial, International Commercial and Global Personal. The North America Commercial segment consists of insurance businesses in the United States, Canada and Bermuda. The International Commercial segment refers to insurance businesses in Japan, the United Kingdom, Europe, Middle East and Africa (EMEA region), Asia Pacific, Latin America and Caribbean, and China. The Global Personal segment is involved in insurance businesses in the United States as well as Japan, the United Kingdom, Europe, Middle East and Africa (EMEA region), Asia Pacific, Latin America and Caribbean, and China. The company was founded by Cornelius Vander Starr in 1919 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: 美國國際集團 (American International Group, Inc.) 是一家提供財產傷亡保險的全球性保險組織，提供一系列產品，包括責任險、金融險、財產險、全球專業險、個人險以及意外和健康險，透過 AIG 營運和網路合作夥伴幫助企業、個人和司法管轄區保護其資產並管理風險。它透過以下部門運作：北美商業部門、國際商業部門和全球個人部門。北美商業部門包括美國、加拿大和百慕達的保險業務。國際商業部門是指日本、英國、歐洲、中東和非洲（EMEA地區）、亞太地區、拉丁美洲和加勒比地區以及中國的保險業務。全球個人部門涉足美國以及日本、英國、歐洲、中東和非洲（EMEA 地區）、亞太地區、拉丁美洲和加勒比地區以及中國的保險業務。該公司由 Cornelius Vander Starr 於 1919 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: The Trade Desk, Inc. engages in the provision of a self-service and cloud-based ad-buying platform. It operates through the United States and International geographical segments. The firm offers omnichannel advertising, audience targeting, solutions for identity, application programming interface (API), custom, and programmatic, measurement and optimization. The company was founded by Jeffrey Terry Green and David Pickles in November 2009 and is headquartered in Ventura, CA.
info.description_zh: The Trade Desk, Inc. 致力於提供自助服務和基於雲端的廣告購買平台。它透過美國和國際地理部門開展業務。該公司提供全通路廣告、受眾定位、身分解決方案、應用程式介面 (API)、客製化和程式化、測量和優化。該公司由 Jeffrey Terry Green 和 David Pickles 於 2009 年 11 月創立，總部位於加州文圖拉。

info.description: O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. owns and operates retail outlets in the United States. It engages in the distribution and retailing of automotive aftermarket parts, tools, supplies, equipment, and accessories in the U.S., serving both professional installers and do-it-yourself customers. It provides new and remanufactured automotive hard parts, including alternators, starters, fuel pumps, water pumps, brake system components, batteries, belts, hoses, temperature controls, chassis parts and engine parts, maintenance items consisting of oil, antifreeze products, fluids, filters, lighting products, engine additives, and appearance products, and accessories, such as floor mats, seat covers, and truck accessories. Its stores offer auto body paint and related materials, automotive tools, and professional service provider service equipment. The firm stores also offer enhanced services and programs consisting of used oil, oil filter and battery recycling, battery, wiper, and bulb replacement, battery diagnostic testing, electrical and module testing, check engine light code extraction, a loaner tool program, drum and rotor resurfacing, custom hydraulic hoses, professional paint shop mixing and related materials, and machine shops. O'Reilly Automotive stores provide do-it-yourself and professional service provider customers a selection of brand name, house brands, and private label products for domestic and imported automobiles, vans, and trucks. The company was founded by Charles F. O'Reilly and Charles H. O'Reilly in November 1957 and is headquartered in Springfield, MO.
info.description_zh: O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. 在美國擁有並經營零售店。该公司在美国从事汽车售后零件、工具、用品、设备和配件的分销和零售，为专业安装人员和自助客户提供服务。它提供全新和再制造的汽车硬零部件，包括交流发电机、起动机、燃油泵、水泵、制动系统组件、电池、皮带、软管、温控器、底盘零件和发动机零件，包括机油、防冻剂产品、液体、过滤器、照明产品、发动机添加剂和外观产品在内的维护项目，以及脚垫、座套和卡车配件等配件。其商店提供車身油漆及相關材料、汽車工具以及專業服務提供者的服務設備。公司商店还提供增强的服务和计划，包括废油、机油滤清器和电池回收、电池、雨刮器和灯泡更换、电池诊断测试、电气和模块测试、检查发动机灯代码提取、借用工具计划、鼓和转子表面重修、定制液压软管、专业喷漆车间混合和相关材料以及机械车间。 O'Reilly Automotive 商店为自助和专业服务提供商客户提供一系列国产和进口汽车、货车和卡车的品牌、自有品牌和自有品牌产品。該公司由 Charles F. O'Reilly 和 Charles H. O'Reilly 於 1957 年 11 月創立，總部位於密蘇裡州斯普林菲爾德。
